prompt:
Generate a Verilog module that satisfies the following description.
Return ONLY the Verilog code, no explanations.

Description:
Create a module named top_module that implements an 8-bit adder. The module has two 8-bit inputs `a` and `b`, and one 8-bit output `sum`. The output should be the sum of a and b (ignoring carry out, i.e. just the lower 8 bits).

Module interface:
module top_module(input [7:0] a, input [7:0] b, output [7:0] sum);

Your implementation:
